description: Patches rc.3 by hardening PRD confirmation guidance so agents continue requirement clarification until the user explicitly approves implementation. No new migrations.
changelog:
**Workflow Guidance:**
- Harden PRD confirmation guidance so implementation only starts after explicit user confirmation or override.
- Treat clarification answers as PRD input, not approval, keeping brainstorm and planning flows in question mode until confirmation is clear.

**Fork Distribution:**
- Continue publishing the bamboo-pan fork package as `@bamboo-pan/trellis` with no migration changes.
notes: Projects on 0.5 beta or earlier rc can run `trellis update`; rc.4 adds no migration entries.
